description: Moody's provides financial data, analytics, credit research, economic forecasting, and risk/insurance technology products. Its offerings span economic datasets, commercial real estate information, catastrophe and climate risk tools, and GenAI-ready data access.
summary: Moody's exposes a remote MCP server, an Economy.com HTTP API estate, a CRE HTTP API, and Insurance Solutions REST APIs; documented auth includes MCP OAuth, Economy.com API key/encryption-key-based auth, and CRE API keys, while Insurance Solutions auth details were not publicly confirmed.
